ModMetaData.name: Super weapons and armors Vanilla
ModMetaData.author: keventao
ModMetaData.description:
This mod adds LWOP-style items WITHOUT Combat Extended.
Items in this mod are inspired by LWOP Package (https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2012717312).
Current features: - Joywire: Permanent mood boost implant - HyperVitality Chip: Neural implant that reduces sleep need to 2 hours per day - Flying Tigers Super Rifle: High-capacity assault rifle (vanilla bullet) - Flying Tigers Elite Helmet: Elite head protection - Flying Tigers Elite Armor: Elite combat armor
This version does NOT require Combat Extended. Use this if you play without CE.
Load Order: This mod works on its own. Place it after other core mods in your mod list.
